_fixture_meta.label: negative
_fixture_meta.note: USDC (USD Coin) — canonical negative fixture. No markets returned by RugCheck (traded via OTC desks and CEX, not primarily on Solana DEX pools). No LP to drain. Mint authority and freeze authority are held by Circle for regulatory compliance but this does not trigger rug-pull detector (D02 is LP-drain specific, not authority-presence detection which is D01 domain). If markets were present and lp_burned_pct >= 70 on each, Signal B would not fire. Detector must return empty Vec or Info event for this token. Source: RugCheck API 2026-04-21.

_d02_state_at_capture.expected_behavior: Err(InsufficientBaseline) or Ok(vec![]) — no markets means no LP to evaluate. Detector returns early with 'no_tradeable_pool' Info event or empty Vec per spec §Failure Modes.
_d02_state_at_capture.note: USDC mint and freeze authorities are Circle-controlled for OFAC compliance. D02 does not evaluate authority presence — that is D01 scope. D02 evaluates LP drain events and LP lock state per market. With zero markets, D02 is not applicable.
